About LIMO LAX

Built for those who
demand the best.

LIMO LAX is a premium ground transportation company based in Los Angeles. We connect discerning clients — executives, celebrities, production companies, and private aviation clients — with elite professional chauffeurs and luxury vehicles.

GMC Yukon XL · TCP Licensed
Our fleet · Ready for any assignment
Our team · TCP Licensed chauffeurs
Our Mission

White-glove service from the moment you land.

We built LIMO LAX because we saw a gap: clients arriving at LAX or private FBOs deserved a seamless, professional ground experience — not guesswork. Every trip is pre-planned, every driver is vetted, and every detail is confirmed before your wheels touch down.

From meet & greet at arrivals to tarmac-side pickup for private aviation, we handle the complexity so you travel in complete comfort.

✓ TCP Licensed & Insured
✓ Flight tracking included
✓ Tarmac access available
✈️ On-tarmac pickup available
🎧 LA’s most trusted luxury transport
Our Fleet & Standards

Every vehicle inspected. Every driver trained.

Our fleet consists of late-model GMC Yukon XL, Cadillac Escalade, Mercedes-Benz S-Class, Lincoln Navigator, and Sprinter Vans. Every vehicle undergoes regular inspection and is maintained to the highest presentation standards.

Our chauffeurs are background-checked, California TCP-licensed, and trained in VIP protocols — including meet & greet etiquette, flight monitoring, no-show procedures, and client confidentiality.

Reserve your ride →
Corporate & Business

Ground transportation
for companies that move.

Dedicated accounts for production companies, talent agencies, hotels, law firms, tech companies, and any organization that moves people regularly across Los Angeles.

📋
Dedicated account manager
One point of contact for all your bookings. We learn your preferences, your regular routes, and your team's needs.

Volume discounts and fixed zone rates negotiated for your account. Predictable costs every month.
⏩
Priority dispatch
Corporate accounts get priority assignment. Same-day and last-minute requests handled first.
🛡️
NDA & confidentiality
All our drivers sign confidentiality agreements. Ideal for entertainment, legal, and executive clients.
📱
Real-time reporting
Monthly trip reports, spend summaries, and driver ratings for your account delivered automatically.

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need
to know.

How far in advance do I need to book? +
We recommend booking at least 2–4 hours in advance for standard trips. For special events, corporate accounts, multi-day trips, or large vehicle needs, we recommend booking 24–48 hours ahead. We do accept last-minute requests subject to availability — call us directly at (310) 000-0000 for urgent bookings.
Do you track my flight if I'm landing at LAX? +
Yes, always. When you provide your flight number, our dispatch team monitors your flight in real time. If your flight is delayed, your driver's schedule adjusts automatically — you will never be charged for flight delays. Our standard included wait time is 60 minutes for international arrivals and 30 minutes for domestic arrivals after the actual landing time.
What is the cancellation policy? +
Free cancellation up to 2 hours before your scheduled pickup. Cancellations within 2 hours of pickup may incur a fee of up to 50% of the trip total. No-shows are non-refundable. Refunds are processed within 5–10 business days. For corporate accounts, cancellation terms are defined in your service agreement.
When is my card charged? +
Your card is not charged at booking. When you submit a reservation, we securely save your card through Stripe. Payment is only captured after our dispatch team reviews and confirms your trip. You will receive a confirmation email with the exact amount before any charge is made.
Do you do airport pickups at terminals or curbside? +
Both options are available. Meet & greet: your driver will be waiting inside the terminal at the arrivals exit with a name sign. Curbside: your driver will be at the designated ground transportation pickup zone. For private aviation at FBOs (fixed-base operators), we offer tarmac-side service — your driver pulls directly to the aircraft. Select your preference when booking or mention it in the special requests field.
Are your drivers licensed and insured? +
Yes. All LIMO LAX drivers hold a valid California TCP (Transportation Charter Party) license, maintain commercial vehicle insurance that meets California state requirements, and pass background checks before onboarding. Vehicle registrations are current and all documentation is monitored and renewed automatically by our system.
Can I request a specific driver? +
Absolutely. Use the "Book Your Driver" option on our booking page to request a specific chauffeur by name. We will do our best to assign your preferred driver. If they are unavailable for your time slot, our dispatch team will contact you to discuss alternatives before confirming.
Do you offer hourly and multi-day service? +
Yes. Our hourly / as directed service has a 3-hour minimum and is perfect for events, meetings, or full-day use. For multi-day arrangements — film productions, conference weeks, wedding weekends, or executive travel — use the "Get a Quote" option on our booking page for custom pricing. Our longest single engagement has been a 14-day production run.
How do I set up a corporate account? +
Fill out the Corporate Account Request form on this page (click "Corporate" in the navigation above). Our team will reach out within 24 hours to discuss your volume, routes, preferred vehicles, and billing terms. Corporate accounts get monthly invoicing, priority dispatch, custom rates, and a dedicated account manager.
What areas do you serve? +
Our primary service area is Greater Los Angeles — including LAX, Burbank, Long Beach, John Wayne (Orange County), Santa Barbara, San Diego, and Palm Springs airports. We also serve all major LA neighborhoods, hotels, studios, and private FBOs. For destinations outside Greater LA, please use the Get a Quote form for custom pricing.
Ready to book?

Your ride is one tap away.

24/7 dispatch · Flight tracking · Flat rates · No surge pricing

Terms & Conditions
LIMO LAX — LLX · Last updated March 2026
Important Notice
LIMO LAX operates exclusively as a transportation booking platform. By reserving, you acknowledge LIMO LAX is not a transportation carrier and does not assume liability for events during your trip.
1
Booking Platform Only
LIMO LAX acts solely as an intermediary connecting clients with independent transportation providers. LIMO LAX does not own, operate, or control the vehicles. LIMO LAX is not a party to the transportation contract between the client and the driver.
2
Limitation of Liability
LIMO LAX, its owners, employees, dispatchers, and affiliates shall not be held liable for any injury, death, property damage, loss, accident, delay, or any other incident occurring during or in connection with transportation services arranged through this platform. All transportation is provided by independent contractors who maintain their own insurance coverage as required by California law.
3
Driver Insurance
Each driver is required to maintain valid commercial vehicle insurance meeting California TCP requirements. In the event of an accident, claims must be directed to the driver's insurance carrier.
4
Cancellation Policy
Cancellations more than 2 hours before pickup are eligible for a full refund. Within 2 hours: up to 50% fee. No-shows are non-refundable. Refunds processed within 5-10 business days.
5
Payment
By providing your card, you authorize LIMO LAX to charge the agreed total upon dispatch confirmation. Card details are processed securely through Stripe and never stored on our servers.
6
Governing Law
These terms are governed by the laws of the State of California. Disputes shall be subject to the courts of Los Angeles County.
These terms are provided for informational purposes. LIMO LAX recommends clients obtain their own travel insurance. Nothing in these terms limits the driver's liability under applicable California law.
